title: parthenium alpinum var. tetraneuris
intro: Parthenium alpinum var. tetraneuris, also known as the pyrethrum plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic qualities, as well as its ability to repel insects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the pyrethrum plant are often used in traditional medicine, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its health benefits.
